content:
✔ Instead of punishment, students who fail can propose a unique research or creative challenge to recover their XP.

3. How should we handle the Final In-Class Event?

✔ Olympic Games Format – Top XP earners compete in a literature-based event (debate, trivia, storytelling).
✔ Finalist(s) get to replace the professor for the day.

🚀 Version 4.7 now integrates all mechanics into a fully immersive system.
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖


📌 Version 4.8 – Finalized Skill-Based Mechanics, Thematic POVs, Mastery Exam Scaffolding, & Redemption Paths


🚀 Fully integrating the skill-based checks, redemption mechanics, fictional character narrators, and choice-driven class paths while locking in final exam structures.

📆 1. Weekly Reflection: Complaint Box with Meta-Layered Structure
